option.name: fileSummaryMaps
option.value: {"C:/Users/DELL/Desktop/Assessment_Management_Sysytem/Backend":"{\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/dto/RegisterRequest.java\":\"This file contains a single class, `RegisterRequest`, which is a data transfer object (DTO) used to represent a user registration request.\\n\\n`RegisterRequest`: A DTO class that holds the username, email, and password for a user registration request.\\n\\n`RegisterRequest()`: The default constructor for the `RegisterRequest` class.\\n\\n`RegisterRequest(String, String, String)`: The parameterized constructor for the `RegisterRequest` class, which takes the username, email, and password as arguments.\\n\\n`getUsername()`: Returns the username stored in the `RegisterRequest` object.\\n\\n`setUsername(String)`: Sets the username in the `RegisterRequest` object.\\n\\n`getEmail()`: Returns the email stored in the `RegisterRequest` object.\\n\\n`setEmail(String)`: Sets the email in the `RegisterRequest` object.\\n\\n`getPassword()`: Returns the password stored in the `RegisterRequest` object.\\n\\n`setPassword(String)`: Sets the password in the `RegisterRequest` object.\",\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/services/implementations/UserServiceImpl.java\":\"This file contains a single class and one function:\\n\\n`UserServiceImpl`: This class implements the `UserService` interface and provides functionality for registering users.\\n\\n`register`: This function takes a `User` object as input and registers the user, returning an empty string.\\n\\nThe purpose of this file is to provide an implementation of the `UserService` interface, which likely handles user-related operations such as registration, authentication, and management.\",\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/services/implementations/SubmissionServiceImpl.java\":\"This file contains a single class:\\n\\n`SubmissionServiceImpl`: This class implements the `SubmissionService` interface, which likely provides functionality related to managing submissions in an assessment system.\\n\\nThe file does not contain any functions, as the class is empty and only serves as an implementation of the `SubmissionService` interface.\",\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/services/interfaces/AssessmentService.java\":\"This file defines an interface named `AssessmentService` without any methods. The purpose of this interface is to provide a contract for services related to assessment management, but the specific functionality is not defined in this file.\",\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/data/repositories/QuestionRepo.java\":\"This file contains a single interface `QuestionRepo` that extends the `MongoRepository` interface provided by the Spring Data MongoDB library.\\n\\n`QuestionRepo`: This interface provides a set of CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) operations for the `Question` model, which is likely a data model representing a question in an assessment system.\\n\\nThe file does not contain any classes or functions. It simply defines a repository interface that can be used to interact with the `Question` model in a MongoDB database.\",\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/controllers/SubmissionController.java\":\"This file contains a single class:\\n\\n`SubmissionController`: This class is likely responsible for handling the submission of assessments or other related data.\\n\\nSince there are no functions defined in this file, the file appears to be a placeholder or a starting point for a more complex controller class that will handle the submission-related functionality of the assessment management system.\",\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/data/models/User.java\":\"This file contains a single class, `User`, which represents a user in the assessment manager application.\\n\\n`User`: A class that represents a user in the assessment manager application, with properties such as name, email, password, role, and creation timestamp.\\n\\nThis file does not contain any functions. It is a data model class that is used to represent a user in the assessment manager application.\",\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/data/models/Assessment.java\":\"This file contains a single class, `Assessment`, which is a data model for an assessment in a Spring Boot application that uses MongoDB as the database.\\n\\n`Assessment`: A data model class that represents an assessment, including its title, description, creator ID, list of question IDs, and settings for randomizing options and questions, as well as the creation and update timestamps.\\n\\nThis file does not contain any functions, only the definition of the `Assessment` class and its properties.\",\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/data/models/Question.java\":\"This file defines a data model for a `Question` entity in a MongoDB database. It uses the Lombok library to generate boilerplate code for the class.\\n\\n`Question`: A class that represents a question in an assessment, with properties for the question text, a list of option IDs, the correct option ID, and a list of tags.\\n\\nThe file does not contain any functions, as it is a data model class.\",\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/data/models/AnsweredQuestion.java\":\"This file contains a single class, `AnsweredQuestion`, which is a data model for representing a question that has been answered.\\n\\n`AnsweredQuestion`: A data model that represents a question that has been answered, containing the question ID and the selected option ID.\\n\\nThis file does not contain any functions. It is a simple data model class that is used to store information about an answered question in a MongoDB database.\",\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/security/JwtUtil.java\":\"This file contains a single class, `JwtUtil`, which is responsible for generating, validating, and extracting information from JSON Web Tokens (JWT).\\n\\n`JwtUtil`: A utility class that provides methods for generating, validating, and extracting information from JSON Web Tokens (JWT).\\n\\n`JwtUtil(String jwtSecret, long expiration)`: A constructor that initializes the `JwtUtil` class with the JWT secret key and the expiration time for the generated tokens.\\n\\n`generateToken(String username, String role)`: Generates a JWT token with the provided username and role.\\n\\n`getUsernameFromToken(String token)`: Extracts the username from the provided JWT token.\\n\\n`getRoleFromToken(String token)`: Extracts the role from the provided JWT token.\\n\\n`validateToken(String token)`: Validates the provided JWT token.\",\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/data/repositories/AssessmentRepo.java\":\"This file contains a single interface `AssessmentRepo` that extends the `MongoRepository` interface provided by Spring Data MongoDB. The purpose of this interface is to define a repository for managing `Assessment` entities in a MongoDB database.\\n\\n`AssessmentRepo`: This interface provides a set of CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) operations for the `Assessment` entity, as well as a custom method `findByCreatorId` to retrieve a list of assessments based on the creator\\u0027s ID.\\n\\n`findByCreatorId`: This method allows you to retrieve a list of `Assessment` entities based on the provided `creatorId` parameter.\",\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/enums/UserRole.java\":\"This file contains a single enum, `UserRole`, which defines the different user roles in the assessment management system.\\n\\n`UserRole`: An enum that defines the different user roles in the assessment management system, including `ADMIN`, `CREATOR`, and `PARTICIPANT`.\",\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/enums/QuestionType.java\":\"This file contains an enumeration (enum) named `QuestionType`, which defines the different types of questions that can be used in an assessment. The enum has three values: `MULTIPLE_CHOICE`, `TRUE_FALSE`, and `SHORT_ANSWER`.\\n\\nThe file does not contain any classes or functions. It simply defines the different types of questions that can be used in an assessment.\",\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/data/models/Option.java\":\"This file contains a single class, `Option`, which is a data model for representing an option in an assessment.\\n\\n`Option`: A data model class that represents an option in an assessment, with an ID and text.\\n\\nThis file does not contain any functions. It is a simple data model class that is likely used in a larger application or system for managing assessments.\",\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/services/interfaces/SubmissionService.java\":\"This file defines an interface called `SubmissionService` which likely provides methods for managing submissions related to an assessment system. However, there are no specific functions defined within the interface, so the file primarily serves as a contract or specification for the `SubmissionService` interface.\",\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/enums/SubmissionStatus.java\":\"This file contains a single enum, `SubmissionStatus`, which represents the different states a submission can be in during the assessment process.\\n\\n`SubmissionStatus`: An enum that defines the possible states of a submission, including \\\"IN_PROGRESS\\\", \\\"COMPLETED\\\", and \\\"GRADED\\\".\",\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/security/JwtAuthenticationFilter.java\":\"This file contains a single class and several functions. Here\\u0027s the summary:\\n\\n`JwtAuthenticationFilter`: A Spring Security filter that validates and processes JWT tokens in incoming requests.\\n\\n`doFilterInternal`: Checks the incoming request for a valid JWT token, extracts the username and role from the token, and sets the authentication context accordingly.\\n\\n`jwtUtil`: A utility class that provides methods for validating, extracting, and generating JWT tokens.\\n\\nThis file implements a JWT-based authentication mechanism for a Spring Security-based application. It checks incoming requests for a valid JWT token, extracts the user\\u0027s identity and role from the token, and sets the appropriate authentication context for the request.\",\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/data/repositories/UserRepo.java\":\"This file contains a single interface named `UserRepo` that extends the `MongoRepository` interface provided by the Spring Data MongoDB library.\\n\\n`UserRepo`: This interface defines a repository for managing `User` entities in a MongoDB database.\\n\\n`findByEmail(String email)`: This function retrieves an `Optional` of a `User` entity based on the provided email address.\",\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/security/SecurityConfig.java\":\"This file is a Spring Security configuration class that sets up the security rules for a web application.\\n\\n`SecurityConfig`: This class configures the security settings for the web application, including CSRF protection, session management, and authorization rules for different user roles.\\n\\n`securityFilterChain`: This function sets up the security filter chain, which defines the authorization rules for different URL patterns and adds the JWT authentication filter.\\n\\n`passwordEncoder`: This function returns a BCryptPasswordEncoder instance, which is used to encode and decode passwords.\",\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/exceptions/UnauthorizedException.java\":\"This file contains a single class:\\n\\n`UnauthorizedException`: This class represents an exception that is thrown when a user attempts to perform an unauthorized action.\\n\\nThis file does not contain any functions. It simply defines a custom exception class to be used in the assessment management application.\",\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/data/models/Submission.java\":\"This file defines a data model for a Submission entity in a MongoDB-based assessment management system.\\n\\n`Submission`: A class that represents a submission made by a participant for an assessment, including the participant\\u0027s ID, the assessment ID, the answered questions, the score, the submission and start times, and the submission status.\\n\\nThe file does not contain any functions, as it is a data model class used for mapping the Submission entity to a MongoDB document.\",\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/services/interfaces/UserService.java\":\"This file defines an interface called `UserService` that provides a method for registering a new user.\\n\\n`UserService`: An interface that defines the contract for user-related services.\\n\\n`register(User user)`: A method that registers a new user and returns a string representing the result of the registration process.\",\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/services/implementations/AssessmentServiceImpl.java\":\"This file contains a single class:\\n\\n`AssessmentServiceImpl`: This class implements the `AssessmentService` interface and is annotated with the `@Service` Spring annotation, indicating that it is a service component in the application.\\n\\nThe file does not contain any functions, as it only defines the `AssessmentServiceImpl` class without any additional methods.\\n\\nOverall, this file appears to be part of a larger application that manages assessments, and the `AssessmentServiceImpl` class is likely responsible for providing the implementation of the `AssessmentService` interface, which may include functionality related to creating, updating, and retrieving assessment data.\",\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/controllers/UserController.java\":\"This file contains a single class:\\n\\n`UserController`: This class is likely responsible for handling user-related functionality in the application.\\n\\nThere are no functions defined in this file. The file appears to be a placeholder for a controller class that will likely contain methods for managing user-related operations, such as authentication, user management, and user-specific actions.\",\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/data/repositories/SubmissionRepo.java\":\"This file contains a Spring Data MongoDB repository interface named `SubmissionRepo` that extends the `MongoRepository` interface. The purpose of this file is to define the data access layer for the `Submission` model in the assessment management application.\\n\\n`SubmissionRepo`: This interface provides methods for interacting with the `Submission` collection in the MongoDB database.\\n\\n`findByParticipantId(String participantId)`: This method retrieves a list of `Submission` objects based on the provided `participantId`.\\n\\n`findByAssessmentId(String assessmentId)`: This method retrieves a list of `Submission` objects based on the provided `assessmentId`.\",\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/controllers/AssessmentController.java\":\"This file contains a single class:\\n\\n`AssessmentController`: This class is likely responsible for handling the logic and processing related to assessments in the application.\\n\\nThis file does not contain any functions. It appears to be a basic class declaration for an `AssessmentController` class, which suggests that this file is part of a larger application that manages assessments.\",\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/Main.java\":\"This file is the main entry point for a Spring Boot application. It contains the following:\\n\\n`Main`: This is the main class that bootstraps the Spring Boot application.\\n\\n`main(String[] args)`: This is the main method that runs the Spring Boot application.\\n\\nThe file sets up the Spring Boot application and runs it, allowing the application to start and serve requests.\",\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/data/repositories/OptionRepo.java\":\"This file contains a single interface named `OptionRepo` that extends the `MongoRepository` interface provided by the Spring Data MongoDB library.\\n\\n`OptionRepo`: This interface provides a set of CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) operations for the `Option` data model, which is likely used to store and manage options related to an assessment.\\n\\nThe file does not contain any functions, as it is an interface that defines the contract for interacting with the `Option` data model in a MongoDB database using the Spring Data MongoDB library.\"}"}

option.name: fileSkeletonMaps
option.value: {"C:/Users/DELL/Desktop/Assessment_Management_Sysytem/Backend":"{\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/controllers/AssessmentController.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/controllers/AssessmentController.java\",\"file_name\":\"AssessmentController.java\",\"methods\":[]},\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/controllers/SubmissionController.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/controllers/SubmissionController.java\",\"file_name\":\"SubmissionController.java\",\"methods\":[]},\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/controllers/UserController.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/controllers/UserController.java\",\"file_name\":\"UserController.java\",\"methods\":[]},\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/data/models/AnsweredQuestion.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/data/models/AnsweredQuestion.java\",\"file_name\":\"AnsweredQuestion.java\",\"methods\":[]},\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/data/models/Assessment.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/data/models/Assessment.java\",\"file_name\":\"Assessment.java\",\"methods\":[]},\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/data/models/Option.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/data/models/Option.java\",\"file_name\":\"Option.java\",\"methods\":[]},\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/data/models/Question.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/data/models/Question.java\",\"file_name\":\"Question.java\",\"methods\":[]},\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/data/models/Submission.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/data/models/Submission.java\",\"file_name\":\"Submission.java\",\"methods\":[]},\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/data/models/User.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/data/models/User.java\",\"file_name\":\"User.java\",\"methods\":[]},\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/data/repositories/AssessmentRepo.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/ creatorId)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"creatorId\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[10,4],[10,55]]}]},\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/data/repositories/OptionRepo.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/data/repositories/OptionRepo.java\",\"file_name\":\"OptionRepo.java\",\"methods\":[]},\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/data/repositories/QuestionRepo.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/data/repositories/QuestionRepo.java\",\"file_name\":\"QuestionRepo.java\",\"methods\":[]},\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/data/repositories/SubmissionRepo.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/data/repositories/SubmissionRepo.java\",\"file_name\":\"SubmissionRepo.java\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"findByParticipantId\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String participantId)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"participantId\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[10,4],[10,63]]},{\"method_name\":\"findByAssessmentId\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String assessmentId)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"assessmentId\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[11,4],[11,61]]}]},\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/data/repositories/UserRepo.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/data/repositories/UserRepo.java\",\"file_name\":\"UserRepo.java\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"findByEmail\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String username, String email, String password)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"username\"},{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"email\"},{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"password\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[11,4],[15,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"getUsername\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"String\",\"scope\":[[18,4],[20,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"setUsername\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String email)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"email\"}],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[30,4],[32,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"getPassword\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"String\",\"scope\":[[34,4],[36,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"setPassword\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String password)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"password\"}],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[38,4],[40,5]]}]},\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/enums/QuestionType.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/enums/QuestionType.java\",\"file_name\":\"QuestionType.java\",\"methods\":[]},\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/enums/SubmissionStatus.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/enums/SubmissionStatus.java\",\"file_name\":\"SubmissionStatus.java\",\"methods\":[]},\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/enums/UserRole.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/enums/UserRole.java\",\"file_name\":\"UserRole.java\",\"methods\":[]},\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/exceptions/UnauthorizedException.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/exceptions/UnauthorizedException.java\",\"file_name\":\"UnauthorizedException.java\",\"methods\":[]},\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/security/JwtAuthenticationFilter.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/security/JwtAuthenticationFilter.java\",\"file_name\":\"JwtAuthenticationFilter.java\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"JwtAuthenticationFilter\",\"method_parameters\":\"(JwtUtil jwtUtil)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"JwtUtil\",\"name\":\"jwtUtil\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[28,4],[30,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"doFilterInternal\",\"method_parameters\":\"(HttpServletRequest request, HttpServletResponse response, FilterChain filterChain)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"HttpServletRequest\",\"name\":\"request\"},{\"type\":\"HttpServletResponse\",\"name\":\"response\"},{\"type\":\"FilterChain\",\"name\":\"filterChain\"}],\"return_type\":\"void\",\"scope\":[[32,4],[47,5]]}]},\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/security/JwtUtil.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/security/JwtUtil.java\",\"file_name\":\"JwtUtil.java\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"JwtUtil\",\"method_parameters\":\"(@Value(\\\"${jwt.secret}\\\") String jwtSecret, @Value(\\\"${jwt.expiration}\\\") long expiration)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"jwtSecret\"},{\"type\":\"long\",\"name\":\"expiration\"}],\"return_type\":\"\",\"scope\":[[30,4],[44,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"generateToken\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String username, String role)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"username\"},{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"role\"}],\"return_type\":\"String\",\"scope\":[[46,4],[54,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"getUsernameFromToken\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String token)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"token\"}],\"return_type\":\"String\",\"scope\":[[56,4],[63,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"getRoleFromToken\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String token)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"token\"}],\"return_type\":\"String\",\"scope\":[[65,4],[72,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"validateToken\",\"method_parameters\":\"(String token)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"String\",\"name\":\"token\"}],\"return_type\":\"boolean\",\"scope\":[[74,4],[84,5]]}]},\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/security/SecurityConfig.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/security/SecurityConfig.java\",\"file_name\":\"SecurityConfig.java\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"securityFilterChain\",\"method_parameters\":\"(HttpSecurity http)\",\"parameter_declarations\":[{\"type\":\"HttpSecurity\",\"name\":\"http\"}],\"return_type\":\"SecurityFilterChain\",\"scope\":[[26,4],[46,5]]},{\"method_name\":\"passwordEncoder\",\"method_parameters\":\"()\",\"parameter_declarations\":[],\"return_type\":\"PasswordEncoder\",\"scope\":[[47,4],[50,5]]}]},\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/services/implementations/AssessmentServiceImpl.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/services/implementations/AssessmentServiceImpl.java\",\"file_name\":\"AssessmentServiceImpl.java\",\"methods\":[]},\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/services/implementations/SubmissionServiceImpl.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/services/implementations/SubmissionServiceImpl.java\",\"file_name\":\"SubmissionServiceImpl.java\",\"methods\":[]},\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/services/implementations/UserServiceImpl.java\":{\"file_path\":\"/src/main/java/assessment/manager/services/implementations/UserServiceImpl.java\",\"file_name\":\"UserServiceImpl.java\",\"methods\":[{\"method_name\":\"register\",\"method_parameters\":\"(User
